texto: As they left the pier and walked into the park, Chahda looked around appreciatively. "Nice place, this. Capital of New Caledonia. Big island, has 8,548 square mile, also has 53,245 peoples. Eleven thousand in Noumea. That is what says the Worrold Alm-in-ack."Rick and Scotty laughed. It was like old times to hear Chahda quoting from The World Almanac. A Bombay beggar boy, he had educated himself with only the Almanac for his textbook, and he had laboriously memorized everything in it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a John Blaine: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “As they left the pier and walked into the park, Chahda looked around appreciatively. "Nice place,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, 1949, almanacs pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de almanacs e bombay.

It was like old times to hear Chahda quoting from The World Almanac. texto: We women have intuition," Barby said loftily. "I wouldn't expect you to understand. I can't imagine why there aren't more women detectives.
